notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead flies out to right fielder Jordan Walker.

notableEvents.label: Jorbit Vivas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas singles on a line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II. Drew Millas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Nathan Church.

notableEvents.label: Victor Scott II GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Victor Scott II grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. Thomas Saggese out at 2nd. Victor Scott II out at 1st.
